title: 2003-era DDR2 memory prices jump up to 60% AI-driven DRAM shortage reaches the oldest standard still in production
summary: DDR2 memory prices surged 55-60% in Q2 and forecasted 35-40% hike.
insight: Rising DDR2 prices signal DRAM industry supply-demand imbalance.

title: Quake changed gaming forever 30 years ago today seminal title established online multiplayer culture and made 3D graphics accelerators essential PC components
summary: Quake's release in 1996 revolutionized gaming with 3D graphics and online multiplayer.
insight: 3D graphics accelerators became essential PC components overnight with Quake's impact.

title: Anycubic Kobra 4 Combo 3D printer review: Evolution, not revolution
summary: The Anycubic Kobra 4 Combo 3D printer offers incremental improvements over its predecessor. It retains the strengths of the Kobra 3 while refining some aspects. This evolution makes it a solid choice for users familiar with the series.
insight: Evolutionary updates rather than revolutionary changes define this 3D printer

title: Ludicrous $999 Steam game lasts just 10 minutes Congratulations On Your Purchase is pure conspicuous consumption with its golden ticket Steam Achievement
summary: The $999 Steam game 'Congratulations On Your Purchase' lasts just 10 minutes, but offers a golden ticket Steam Achievement to buyers. This game is an example of pure conspicuous consumption, highlighting the absurdity of some digital marketplaces. It's the most expensive game on Steam, priced at $999.
insight: Conspicuous consumption exploits human vanity for financial gain on Steam.

title: Powerhouse AMD Ryzen 7 9800X3D hits record-low price at Amazon UK, now just 339.99 get one of our favourite gaming CPUs with its game-changing AMD 3D V-cache technology
summary: The AMD Ryzen 7 9800X3D has reached a record-low price of £339.99 at Amazon UK.
insight: High-performance gaming CPU becomes more affordable for PC enthusiasts.

title: Nintendo Switch 2 is $399 at Woot for new customers, $419 for returning customers with code save up to $100 on gaming handheld while stocks last
summary: Get a brand-new Nintendo Switch 2 for $399 or $419 with savings.
insight: Significant discount on a popular gaming handheld console.

title: Open-source Vulkan driver NVK gains experimental DLSS support bringing Nvidia s upscaling tech to Linux via imported CUDA binaries
summary: NVK, an open-source Vulkan driver, has gained experimental DLSS support, bringing Nvidia's upscaling tech to Linux. This support is made possible through the import of CUDA binaries. The addition of DLSS is a significant improvement for Linux users.
insight: Linux users gain access to advanced Nvidia graphics features

title: Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot dies in plane crash French publisher established in 1986 became one of the biggest entertainment companies in the world
summary: Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot died in a plane crash while enroute to an airshow. Guillemot was a licensed and avid pilot. He co-founded Ubisoft in 1986.
insight: Gaming industry loses a pioneering figure in a tragic accident

title: Dramatically redesigned GMKtec EVO-X3 shown bearing Lisa Su s signature of approval flagship AI mini PC workstation is built around AMD s Ryzen AI Max+ 395 'Strix Halo' processor, again
summary: GMKtec's EVO-X3 'Strix Halo' Mini PC receives endorsement from AMD CEO Lisa Su, featuring AMD's Ryzen AI Max+ 395 processor.
insight: Industry validation boosts credibility for cutting-edge AI mini PC technology.

title: Samsung and SK hynix bonuses for chip workers flagged as a national inflation risk Bank of Korea projects full-year inflation significantly above its 2% target
summary: The Bank of Korea has flagged bonuses at Samsung and SK hynix as a national inflation risk, projecting full-year inflation significantly above its 2% target. This move suggests that large bonuses could exacerbate inflationary pressures in South Korea. The Bank of Korea is closely monitoring the situation to mitigate potential economic instability.
insight: Large bonuses fuel inflation, threatening economic stability in South Korea.

title: ST VL53L9CX direct Time-of-Flight 3D LiDAR supports 5cm to 9m range, 2.3K zones resolution
summary: STMicroelectronics VL53L9CX is a mini 3D LiDAR module offering 5cm-9m range and 2.3K zones resolution.
insight: Revolutionizing robotics and automation with high-resolution 3D sensing capabilities

title: GEEKOM A7 2026 Edition Review Part 2: AMD Ryzen 5 7545U Mini PC tested with Windows 11 Pro
summary: This review tests the GEEKOM A7 2026 Edition mini PC with Windows 11 Pro, focusing on its AMD Ryzen 5 7545U processor, Radeon 740M graphics, 16 GB of RAM, and 466 GB of storage. It evaluates its performance in various tasks, including 4K and 8K video playback, network performance, and cooling. The review aims to provide a comprehensive assessment of the mini PC's capabilities and its suitability for different use cases.
insight: Ryzen 5 7545U offers competitive performance in a compact, affordable package.

title: UTFS is a lightweight, zero-allocation file system for embedded devices
summary: UTFS is a lightweight, zero-allocation file system for embedded devices, offering a simple, fixed-header storage solution. It's designed for small MCUs with flat, byte-addressable memory and avoids complex features. UTFS supports sequential layout and is forward-compatible.
insight: Simplifies storage on resource-constrained embedded devices significantly.

title: Best of Sensors: Stathera wins Best MEMS Solution at Sensors Converge
summary: Strathera's DualMode MEMS oscillator uses fusion bonding tech, generating kHz and MHz frequencies from a single MEMS resonator, winning the Best of Sensors award in the MEMS Solution category at Sensors Converge.
insight: Breakthrough fusion bonding tech expands MEMS oscillator capabilities

title: Ouster lidar for Gecko robots improves detect and repair
summary: Ouster's Rev8 lidar sensors enhance Gecko Robotics' sensing capabilities for infrastructure inspection.
insight: Enhanced detection of cracks in infrastructure for more precise repairs.

title: ADI buys Empower for $1.5B and then reports record 2Q bookings
summary: ADI acquires Empower for $1.5B, providing access to resources and expertise.
insight: Empower's FinFast tech accelerates AI system development significantly.

title: Obsidian sued over alleged unpaid wages, missed breaks, and California labor law violations
summary: Victoria Turner has sued Obsidian Entertainment over unpaid wages and labor law violations, with an amended complaint filed in January 2026.
insight: California labor law enforcement can affect game development companies nationwide.

title: Intel and AMD unveil new x86 standard to make CPUs better at running AI models
summary: Intel and AMD unveil Advanced Compute Extensions (ACE) to enhance AI model processing on x86 processors, focusing on smaller models and latency-sensitive tasks.
insight: Boosting AI performance on x86 CPUs in GPU-less environments matters

title: Ori director says Game Pass needs "smash hits," not studios slopping out mediocre content
summary: Xbox is going through a turbulent time, to say the least. Last week brought news that the company is closing Ninja Theory and Double Fine, with Compulsion and others set for the chopping block part of the major layoffs that are being implemented. We've also heard that Microsoft could... Read Entire Article

title: Google is spending billions to turn its TPU chips into a real challenger to Nvidia
summary: Google invests $3.2 billion in AI data-center cluster, Lake Mariner, near Niagara Falls. The project will utilize thousands of Google's TPU chips to provide computing power. This move marks a significant shift in the tech giant's competitive strategy.
insight: Google's TPU chips pose a growing challenge to Nvidia's dominance.

title: Modder cools RTX 3060 with countertop ice machine, slashing gaming temps by up to 62%
summary: A modder used a countertop ice machine to cool an RTX 3060, reducing gaming temps by up to 62%. This experiment was inspired by another YouTuber's CPU cooling loop. The ice machine replenished its ice constantly.
insight: Passive cooling can be highly effective with constant ice replenishment.

title: HDMI 2.2 doubles bandwidth to 96Gbps, enabling uncompressed 4K at 240Hz
summary: HDMI 2.2 supports uncompressed 4K at 240Hz and 8K at 60Hz.
insight: Enables seamless high-speed video transmission for gaming and streaming.

title: A 35-year-old copyright rule could let Ultima's creator make a new game EA can't stop
summary: Richard Garriott, Ultima's creator, seeks to revive the series with EA's help, but previous attempts stalled due to lack of progress. Despite EA's initial interest, no concrete outcome resulted from these efforts. Garriott believes a 35-year-old copyright rule may be the key to making a new game without EA's control.
insight: 35-year copyright rule may free Ultima's creator from EA's control.

title: Cyberpunk's disastrous launch still haunts CD Projekt Red, but hopes The Witcher 4 can win players back
summary: CD Projekt Red still faces the aftermath of Cyberpunk 2077's disastrous launch but hopes The Witcher 4 can win back players. Following numerous patches, Cyberpunk 2077's quality improved, and the Phantom Liberty expansion received positive reviews. This may set a precedent for The Witcher 4's success.
insight: Rebuilding trust takes time and quality game releases
